title: Daggerlance
description: A simple mod that adds a daggerlance. it has more reach than a sword but has a slightly longer cooldown
body:
## **Features**
###  **items**

**daggerlance:**
- has more reach than a sword
- deals the same damage of a sword
- has a longer cooldown than a sword
- wither skeletons have a chance to spawn holding a daggerlance with a randomized skin
- from v1.2 and up killing the wither skeletons drop their daggerlance if they are killed with a netherite sword, netherite axe or a daggerlance in hand (configurable by changing the drops_daggerlance tag with a data pack) , you can turn this off by setting the requireWeaponToDropDaggerlance gamerule to false

**lancium: (v1.3)**
- can be crafted with 4 netherite scraps and 4 obsidian
- when one of the blcoks in the lancium blockset or a daggerlance is on fire they will drop lancium
- can be used to repair daggerlances

###  **blocks**
**lancium bricks blockset plus a lancium block (v1.3)**

## **Weapon skins**
the daggerlance has currently 6 skins that you can change by sneak right clicking on an anvil or smithing table

## **compatibility**
- **[Arsenal](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal)**
      - the mod is fully compatible with arsenal's back slot and weapon rack in 1.20.1 (sadly it isn't ported to 1.21.5 yet)
- **[Combat Amenities](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal)**
      - the mod is fully compatible with the mod's back and belt slot in v1.3

## **FAQ**
- ### **What versions will it support?**
   **no plans to port the mod to old versions but it might get ported to the newer versions from time to time**

- ### **Does it require any additional mods?**
  **Yes, just [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
but I recommend downloading  [Arsenal](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal) or [Combat Amenities](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal) too**

- ### **Where can I report any issues that I have?**
  **You can report bugs and issues in the github page or in the discord server**

- ### **Can I modify this mod?**
  **No , not even if it's for personal use, tho feel free to look at the code to study how things are done. it's okay to put it in a modpack, if you want to showcase it in a video please mention the mod's name or put a link to the mod. for porting the mod get permission first from in discord**

## **Credits**
**Thanks to [Medecoole](https://modrinth.com/user/medecoole) for the custom particles code on 1.21.5 & [MerlinTheFoodGuy](https://www.curseforge.com/members/merlinthefoodguy) for the vana skin, please check them out :D**
